prompt: Починаю працювати над оптимізацією пошуку в vector-store.ts, запусти сесію
assertions: Calls start_session with a descriptive sessionId
Calls context_briefing with task mentioning vector-store.ts optimization and files including vector-store.ts

Runs start_session and get_developer_profile in parallel
